title: Applicability
doc_html:
§2381.3. Applicability

            This Chapter shall apply to entities that have implemented community air monitoring programs as defined in this Chapter.

            Acts 2024, No. 181, §1, eff. May 23, 2024.
doc_text:
§2381.3. Applicability
This Chapter shall apply to entities that have implemented community air monitoring
programs as defined in this Chapter.
Acts 2024, No. 181, §1, eff. May 23, 2024.
